title: Epic: WebSocket transport client
description:
Why: Current client uses SSE only. IMPROVEMENTS.md §1.1 defines a new WebSocket companion spec (draft-atwood-jmap-chat-wss-00) that adds low-latency ephemeral events: ChatTypingEvent, ChatPresenceEvent. WebSocket is lower latency than SSE and required for real-time typing indicators and presence.

What:
- Add tokio-tungstenite dependency
- WebSocket connect/reconnect with exponential backoff
- Capability detection: if session advertises urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat:websocket, prefer WS over SSE
- ChatStreamEnable: send on connect and on chat view change
- ChatStreamDisable: send when leaving a chat context
- ChatTypingEvent receive → dispatch to AppEvent::TypingIndicator
- ChatPresenceEvent receive → dispatch to AppEvent::PresenceUpdate
- On reconnect, re-send ChatStreamEnable to restore subscriptions (session-scoped)
- Tests using a mock WebSocket server

Depends on: types.rs upgrades epic (jmap-chat-tui-1aq), methods refactor epic
close_reason: Epic complete: WebSocket transport client implemented, reviewed, and all review issues resolved
